---
title: "Training statistical learning models"
subtitle: "Bias-variance, validation, resampling"
date: "Sep 4, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Under- and over-fitting; the training/validation/test split; k-fold cross-validation and the bootstrap. Foundations for every method we'll see later in the course.

📖 **Assigned reading:** ISLR §2.2, ch. 5

---

## 📊 Slides

- 🖥️ [Clean slides](slides_clean.pdf)
- 🖨️ [Slides (2-up)](slides_split.pdf)  *(two per page, for printing)*

## 📚 Readings

- 📄 [Efron (1983)](readings/reading1_efron1983.pdf)
- 📄 [Efron (1981)](readings/reading2_efron1981.pdf)
- 📄 [Bates (2024)](readings/reading3_bates2024.pdf)

## 💻 Code

**Figure scripts** — reproduce each figure from the slides:

- 📈 [fig1.R](code/fig1.R)
- 📈 [fig2.R](code/fig2.R)
- 📈 [fig3.R](code/fig3.R)
- 📈 [fig4.R](code/fig4.R)

**Other scripts:**

- 📜 [helper.R](code/helper.R)

## ⭐ Extras

Optional supplementary material:

- 📄 [K Fold Vs Moving CV](extras/Extra_kFold_vs_moving_CV.pdf)
- 📜 [K Fold Vs Moving CV](extras/Extra_kFold_vs_moving_CV.R)
